title: EvidenceEdge
description: A wire from a TermNode to a place its meaning is backed. The citation (ref + stratum + sense) is imported/authored; resolved + file_exists are folded by checking the cited substring against committed repo bytes. The bytes win: a hand-set resolved is ignored.

to.description: the SiteNode id for the cited file/record.

stratum.description: which source-of-truth surface this citation lives in. doctrine/code/log/workflow/causality are CLAIMED strata: an unresolved claim is the ghost signal.

sense.description: authored: the meaning-cluster this evidence supports. Distinct senses on one term, with an incompatible flag, mean overload.

claim.description: authored: one line on what this evidence shows a cold reader.

resolved.description: DERIVED: the cited substring is present in the cited file's committed bytes.

file_exists.description: DERIVED: the cited file is readable at all.

file.description: repo-relative path, or a log file under .ai-native/log/.

contains.description: the stable substring that IS the citation's identity (line numbers drift; this does not).

line.description: optional display hint only; resolution does not use it.

$comment: Invalid: from not a term:* id; ref without a file; stratum outside the enum. Note 'contains' is required for any citation that should ever resolve (its absence guarantees resolved:false).
